description: A photograph depicting a rural landscape under a clear blue sky with scattered white clouds. In the foreground, there is a field of golden-brown stubble, characteristic of recently harvested or fallow arable land, with distinct parallel rows or furrows indicating agricultural management. In the middle ground, a dry, sparsely vegetated hill rises, showing lighter patches of exposed earth or dry vegetation and some small trees or shrubs on its left slope. This image visually represents the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Land Use / Land Cover (LULC) category of "managed non-irrigated arable land," which falls under CLC class "2.1.1.0 Arable Irrigated and Non-Irrigated Land" and specifically "Class 2.1.1.0 Type A: Non-Irrigated Arable Land."
